flavorText: Paladins of Devotion swear to embody virtue and radiant justice.

features.description: Your oath is defined by Honesty, Courage, Compassion, Honor, and Duty.
As Channel Divinity, your weapon becomes magical and gains a bonus to attack rolls equal to your Charisma modifier for 1 minute.
You and friendly creatures within your aura are immune to the charmed condition.
You can emit bright light in a 30-foot radius, dealing 10 radiant damage to foes that start their turn in the light.
You are always under the effects of protection from evil and good.
At 18th–20th tier, your sacred aura reaches farther and your Sacred Weapon presence is further enhanced.

devotion-tenets.summary: Your oath is built on honesty, courage, compassion, honor, and duty, giving the subclass a clear knightly moral core.
devotion-tenets.description: Tenets of Devotion are not just flavor text; they explain why the subclass fights in a direct, protective, radiant style instead of through trickery or vengeance.

devotion-channel-divinity-sacred-weapon.summary: Imbue your weapon with radiant certainty so your attacks become far more reliable during a key exchange.
devotion-channel-divinity-sacred-weapon.description: Sacred Weapon is a classic Devotion paladin moment: draw the line, raise the weapon, and fight with unmistakable divine authority. Use it when accuracy matters more than surprise and you need to own the center of the fight.

devotion-aura-of-devotion.summary: Your aura protects nearby allies from being charmed, reinforcing the subclass as a moral anchor against manipulation.
devotion-aura-of-devotion.description: Aura of Devotion turns the paladin into a stabilizing presence in enchantment-heavy encounters and makes positioning around you materially safer for allies.

devotion-holy-nimbus.summary: Break into blazing holy radiance that punishes nearby foes and declares your presence unmistakably.
devotion-holy-nimbus.description: Holy Nimbus is a dramatic escalation button. It should feel like the paladin stepping fully into angelic battlefield presence rather than merely turning on a light source.

devotion-purity-of-spirit.summary: Hostile supernatural corruption has a far harder time taking hold of you.
devotion-purity-of-spirit.description: Purity of Spirit reinforces Devotion as the paladin who stands unbent against malign outside influence.

devotion-sacred-weapon-improvement.summary: Your iconic oath technique scales so it remains worthy of late-game encounters.
devotion-sacred-weapon-improvement.description: This improvement keeps Sacred Weapon relevant into the higher tiers, ensuring the subclass’s signature buff remains a real payoff instead of early-level nostalgia.
